creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #3)

No. It does not work as intended.

Unless b y works as inteded means does work for most people.

This is very far off the standard path for most people as it requires manually specifying a repo to use in a way that pkg does not handle by default.

What is wrong here? Pkg repos used by most people don't contain multiple archs. Nor does pkg properly handle it if it does.

And if you want some wording try this.

    If you are a repo other than the default, please set WINE_PKG_32 to the base URL of that repo.

Then have the script build upon that env.
